html:
Exclusive to:  

The Bramble Trap is a character-specific Weapon similar to the Tooth Trap, only available in the Hamlet DLC and Don't Starve Together. It is craftable by Wormwood from the Green Thumb Tab using a Living Log and a Stinger. It can be placed on the ground and deals 40 damage in a radius of one Pitchfork tile when it is stepped on by a Mob, also damaging Walls. This can damage the player, but the player will not activate it by stepping over it. The splash damage can be avoided by wearing a Bramble Husk, which will negate its damage without losing any durability. Like a Tooth Trap, it has 10 uses and must be reset after each use.

Bramble Trap damage will not aggro nearby mobs, nor will it increase a player's Naughtiness. Bramble Traps are also fireproof. A Bramble Trap can be picked up and placed elsewhere at any time, regardless of having been triggered or not.

Mobs

The following Mobs cannot activate Tooth and Bramble Traps:

  • Abigail
  • Bee
  • Killer Bee
  • Grumble Bee
  • Bee Queen
  • Butterfly
  • Batilisk
  • Fruit Fly
  • Lord of the Fruit Flies
  • Friendly Fruit Fly
  • Mosquito
  • Birds
  • Chester
  • Hutch
  • Lureplant
  • Dragonfly
  • Glommer
  • Beefalo with Saddle
  • Shadow Creature
  • Shadow Pieces
  • Shriek

Tips

  • Although clustering these traps together can be dangerous, the player can avoid damage altogether from these by wearing a Bramble Husk. This makes farming large groups of enemies like Spiders simple and easy.

Gallery

  • Concept art of the Bramble Trap (right) from Rhymes With Play #241.

“It'd really poke whoever stepped on it.”
–Wilson
“It's got really sharp thorns.”
–Willow
“Is sharp plant for hurting feets.”
–Wolfgang

–Wendy
“I HATE PLANTS”

–Wickerbottom

–Woodie
“Best laid traps.”
–Maxwell
“A möst clever trap för öne's föes.”
–Wigfrid
“It's a very pointy planty trap!”
–Webber
“My salady friend made this.”
–Warly
“Friends made a trap!”
–Wormwood
“That lil plant fella whipped it up.”
–Winona
“Spiky, pointy, green and thorny!”
–Wortox
“Plant trap!”
–Wurt
“He's pretty good at this!”
–Walter
“If any intruders come by, they'll be in for a thorny surprise.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bẫy Mâm Xôi là một Vũ khí dành riêng cho nhân vật tương tự như Bẫy Răng, chỉ có trong Hamlet DLC và Don't Starve Together. Nó có thể được chế tạo bởi Wormwood từ Thẻ Ngón Cái Xanh bằng cách sử dụng Gỗ Sống và Stinger. Nó có thể được đặt trên mặt đất và gây 40 sát thương trong bán kính của một ô Chĩa khi nó bị Mob dẫm lên, đồng thời gây sát thương cho Tường. Điều này có thể gây sát thương cho người chơi, nhưng người chơi sẽ không kích hoạt nó bằng cách bước qua nó. Có thể tránh được sát thương văng bằng cách đeo Bramble Husk, nó sẽ vô hiệu hóa sát thương của nó mà không làm mất đi độ bền. Giống như một cái bẫy răng, nó có 10…

The '''Bramble Trap''' is a [[character]]-specific [[Weapon]] similar to the [[Tooth Trap]], only available in the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC and ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is craftable by [[Wormwood]] from the [[Green Thumb Tab]] using a [[Living Log]] and a [[Stinger]]. It can be placed on the ground and deals 40 damage in a radius of one [[Pitchfork]] tile when it is stepped on by a [[Mob]], also damaging [[Walls]]. This can damage the player, but the player will not activate it by stepping over it. The splash damage can be avoided by wearing a [[Bramble Husk]], which will negate its damage without losing any durability. Like a Tooth Trap, it has 10 uses and must be reset after each use.

Bramble Trap damage will not aggro nearby mobs, nor will it increase a player's [[Krampus#Naughtiness|Naughtiness]]. Bramble Traps are also fireproof. A Bramble Trap can be picked up and placed elsewhere at any time, regardless of having been triggered or not.

== Mobs ==
{{#lsth:Tooth Trap/DST|Mobs}}

=={{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips==
* Although clustering these traps together can be dangerous, the player can avoid damage altogether from these by wearing a Bramble Husk. This makes farming large groups of enemies like [[Spider]]s simple and easy.
